summary: Iteration 136: Tested PDF slip generation (2 copies vs 1 copy), WhatsApp toggle persistence (ON/OFF), and Settings page tabs layout. All 12 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: WhatsApp toggle persists OFF state after reload, all 8 Settings sub-tabs visible on one line, Vehicle Weight page has download buttons.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All bug fixes verified: 1) PDF slip returns valid PDF with 2 copies (full slip ~3550 bytes) vs 1 copy (party_only ~2891 bytes), 2) WhatsApp toggle enabled=false persists correctly via PUT /api/whatsapp/settings and GET returns enabled=false, 3) WhatsApp toggle enabled=true also persists correctly, 4) Frontend download button calls slip-pdf WITHOUT party_only=1 (line 405 in VehicleWeight.jsx), 5) Settings page has 8 sub-tabs all visible on one line: Branding, GST, Stock, Messaging, Camera, Weighbridge, Data, Error Log, 6) WhatsApp toggle UI shows ON/OFF correctly and auto-saves on click with toast notification.

features_tested.backend_whatsapp_toggle_off: PASS - PUT enabled=false persists, GET returns enabled=false
features_tested.backend_whatsapp_toggle_on: PASS - PUT enabled=true persists, GET returns enabled=true
features_tested.backend_whatsapp_toggle_off_no_api_key: PASS - Toggle OFF works without API key
features_tested.backend_pdf_slip_valid: PASS - Returns valid PDF with magic bytes and EOF marker
features_tested.backend_pdf_full_vs_party_only: PASS - Full slip (3550 bytes) larger than party_only (2891 bytes)
features_tested.backend_pdf_uses_reportlab: PASS - PDF generated by ReportLab library
features_tested.backend_pdf_uses_helvetica: PASS - PDF uses Helvetica and Helvetica-Bold fonts
features_tested.backend_pdf_rst3_entry: PASS - PDF generation works for RST#3 entry
features_tested.frontend_settings_navigation: PASS - Settings tab navigates to Settings page
features_tested.frontend_settings_8_subtabs: PASS - All 8 sub-tabs visible on one line
features_tested.frontend_messaging_tab: PASS - Messaging sub-tab shows WhatsApp section
features_tested.frontend_whatsapp_toggle_ui: PASS - Toggle shows ON/OFF state correctly
features_tested.frontend_whatsapp_toggle_click: PASS - Toggle changes state on click with toast
features_tested.frontend_whatsapp_toggle_persistence: PASS - Toggle OFF state persists after page reload
features_tested.frontend_vehicle_weight_page: PASS - Vehicle Weight page loads with completed entries
features_tested.frontend_download_buttons: PASS - 4 download buttons visible in completed entries table
